# Pull Request

## Type of change

- [ ] New diagnostic logs (in `logs/<username>_<YYYY-MM-DD>/`)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Bug fix in a script
- [ ] New feature in a script
- [ ] Other

## Summary

<!-- What does this PR do? Why? -->

## Affiliation disclosure

- [ ] I am submitting on my own behalf
- [ ] I am affiliated with the vendor of the software being investigated (please specify)
- [ ] I am affiliated with another antivirus / security vendor (please specify)

## For log submissions

- [ ] My log folder is named `logs/<my-github-username>_<YYYY-MM-DD>/` and contains a README.md following the [`logs/_template/README.md`](../logs/_template/README.md) format
- [ ] I ran `scripts/RedactLogs.ps1` against all CSV and TXT files
- [ ] I manually reviewed the redacted files and found no remaining personal info
- [ ] My PR does NOT modify or delete any other contributor's existing logs
- [ ] My PR does NOT modify any of the diagnostic scripts, redaction script, or bug-report markdown documents

## For script / documentation changes

- [ ] I have tested any code changes locally
- [ ] I have updated the CHANGELOG.md if relevant
- [ ] I have updated the README.md or other docs if relevant

## Anything else

<!-- Notes, caveats, things to double-check during review -->
